title: Crafting Tome and Cloak Interface Spec v1.0

story.text:
# 📄 Crafting Tome and Cloak Interface Spec v1.0
**document** · shared · knowledge

How operators craft within the universe — the interface between Crafting Tomes (Tome V genre) and the Cloak primitive. RUN · E · CRAFT three-phase ceremony, attractor walking in RUN, ceiling-respect in CRAFT, the inscription gesture binding artifact to lattice position. Source: docs/tomes/specs/02-crafting-tome-and-cloak-interface-spec.md.

## Edges out

- *implements* → [[C18-C21 · Lorenz Attractor]]
- *implements* → [[C22-C25 · EML Three Ceilings]]
